Function.Inference: Bars 1-4 serve as an intro, ending with a repeat start sign |: at bar 4.
The main looped body of the track, enclosed by repeat signs and ending with :| at bar 24.

Section.Inference: Introductory phrase before the main loop.
The first 8 bars establish the primary melody and rhythmic texture.
Melody develops further with harmonic changes, leading to a climax and resolving back to loop.
